defaults.composition: VERTICAL 9:16 full-frame mobile composition (Instagram Reels / TikTok) — the character is prominent and large, occupying the central vertical band; the environment stacks above and below the character; tall vertical framing, NOT a wide letterbox shot
defaults.hud: a GTA V style minimap radar navigation HUD overlay in the bottom-left corner of the frame, plus a thin GTA-style health/status bar, video game heads-up display look
defaults.style: shot on iPhone 15 Pro Max, natural light, slight grain, candid documentary style, no filters, hyperrealistic, real phone snapshot, authentic moment
defaults.negative: selfie, front-facing portrait, character's face toward camera, looking at the camera, eye contact, cinematic color grade, studio lighting, illustration, cartoon, anime, 3d render, cgi, plastic skin, distorted hands, extra fingers, deformed body

video.common_motion: subtle natural motion, preserve character identity and location exactly, no morphing, no warping, keep the same building and same face, stable consistent style
video.negative: face turning toward camera, character looking at camera, identity change, face morph, building changing, flicker, warping, melting, extra limbs, jitter

scenes.title: Sokakta Yürüyor
scenes.framing: camera floating 3 meters behind at 1.7m height, character in lower-center of frame
scenes.action: character walking forward down the street, relaxed confident stride, arms natural at sides
scenes.environment: narrow Miami Little Havana street, old red brick and pastel buildings on both sides, cobblestone sidewalk, NORTH restaurant visible ahead in the distance, vintage 1960s American cars parked along the curb, palm trees, overhead cables, golden late afternoon sunlight

scenes.title: NORTH'a Yaklaşıyor
scenes.framing: camera 3 meters ahead of the character at chest height 1.4m, dollying backward as he walks toward it, character centered and facing forward, face clearly lit and visible
scenes.action: character walking toward the NORTH entrance, approaching with a calm confident stride, eyes on the doorway just past the camera
scenes.environment: the narrow Miami Little Havana street stretching out behind the character, old red brick and pastel buildings on both sides, vintage 1960s American cars parked along the curb, palm trees and overhead cables, warm amber glow from the NORTH doorway washing over his face from the camera side, golden late afternoon backlight rimming his shoulders

scenes.title: Kapıyı Açıyor
scenes.framing: camera floating 2.5 meters behind at 1.7m height, character in center-left of frame
scenes.action: character standing at the NORTH door, right hand reaching out to push the door open, door beginning to swing inward
scenes.environment: NORTH black wooden door directly ahead, brass handle, red brick facade around the door, NORTH sign above, terracotta plant pots on the sides, warm amber light spilling from the opening door, cobblestone underfoot, golden afternoon light

scenes.title: İçeri Giriyor
scenes.framing: camera floating 2.5 meters behind at 1.7m height, following the character into the building, character in center of frame
scenes.action: character walking into the empty restaurant, stepping forward into the space
scenes.environment: abandoned empty restaurant interior, exposed weathered red brick walls, high ceiling with old wooden beams, overturned wooden tables and scattered chairs, dust particles floating in the afternoon light, large window on the right with golden light streaming in, empty bar counter at the back

scenes.title: Mekanın Ortasında
scenes.framing: camera elevated 2.5m behind looking down the length of the tall room, vertical framing with the high beamed ceiling rising above and the character standing clearly in the mid-lower frame, deep perspective into the space
scenes.action: character standing still in the center of the empty restaurant, looking around the abandoned space, arms relaxed at sides
scenes.environment: vast abandoned restaurant interior surrounding the character, high ceiling with exposed dark wooden beams, weathered red brick walls all around, overturned tables and scattered chairs, dramatic golden light beams through the right window, dust particles, old framed photographs on the walls, empty bar counter at the back, sense of scale and emptiness

scenes.title: Duruyor, Karar
scenes.framing: camera low at 0.8m height about 2 meters in front of the character angled upward, three-quarter front hero framing, the face lit by the window light, character filling the central frame
scenes.action: character standing still in the center of the empty space, gazing off toward the window light, slight lift of the chin, contemplative confident posture taking it all in
scenes.environment: abandoned restaurant interior framing him from the front, weathered red brick walls and exposed wooden beams behind him, dramatic golden light beams from the side window raking across his face, dust particles drifting in the air, empty space full of potential

scenes.title: Mutfak Girişi
scenes.framing: camera elevated 2.5m at a 30 degree downward angle, vertical framing, the character prominent in the mid-frame pushing through the swing doors, the bright stainless kitchen stretching upward beyond
scenes.action: character pushing through double swing kitchen doors from the dining room into the kitchen, both arms raised pushing the doors outward, stepping forward, dynamic stride
scenes.environment: restaurant kitchen entrance from the dining side, double wooden swing doors with round porthole windows in the foreground opening into a bright stainless-steel commercial kitchen seen from above, polished steel countertops stretching back, long row of hanging copper pots and pans, gas range and grill far back, ceramic checkerboard floor tiles, early morning sunlight from high side windows casting long shadows, dust in the light beams

scenes.title: Önlüğü Bağlıyor
scenes.framing: camera very close 1.2 meters behind at waist height 1.0m, slight 5 degree dutch tilt, tight cropped frame on the upper back and the hands tying the knot
scenes.action: character standing at a stainless steel prep counter facing away, both arms bent sharply backward, hands behind his back tying the chef apron strap into a tight knot at the small of his back, apron straps crossing visibly on his back
scenes.environment: extreme closeup of a commercial kitchen prep zone, focus on the rough black canvas apron straps and the knot being tied at the small of the back, white cotton t-shirt fabric and silver watch visible, blurred background of stainless steel counter and hanging copper pots, warm side window light raking across the back, intimate quiet moment

scenes.title: Izgara Ateşi
scenes.framing: camera at ground level 0.6m height to the LEFT side of the character at 1.5 meters distance, three-quarter back side-profile, character silhouetted against the bright grill flames
scenes.action: character crouched in front of a large industrial gas grill, right hand on the gas valve knob, head turned slightly toward the grill, blue and orange flames just igniting and licking up under the cast iron grates
scenes.environment: kitchen grill station seen from a low side angle, massive stainless industrial gas grill dominating the frame, blue and orange ignition flames bursting along the burner row, smoke just starting, suspended exhaust hood overhead, dark exposed brick wall behind the grill, rack of copper saucepans on the side wall, dim warm tungsten kitchen light contrasting with the bright flame

scenes.title: Tezgahta Sebze Doğruyor
scenes.framing: camera just above and behind the right shoulder at 1.9m height angled steeply downward 50 degrees onto the cutting board, knife and hands filling the lower foreground, head visible at the top of frame from behind
scenes.action: character standing at a wooden prep board, chef knife gripped in the right hand in a mid downstroke slicing through a red bell pepper, left hand curled holding the pepper, focused downward gaze, motion blur on the knife edge
scenes.environment: prep station seen top-down over-shoulder, large worn wooden cutting board centered, vivid fresh ingredients laid out — red and yellow bell peppers half-sliced, whole tomatoes, white onion, garlic cloves, sprigs of parsley and thyme, a sharp German chef knife mid-cut, stainless counter edge at the top, neat mise en place

scenes.title: Salonu Kontrol Ediyor
scenes.framing: camera 2.5 meters to the side moving parallel to the walk, character in profile mid-frame walking left to right, long row of tables receding behind into deep perspective
scenes.action: character walking slowly through the restored empty dining room down the center aisle between tables, mid stride, left hand brushing the back of a wooden chair, head turned slightly inspecting place settings
scenes.environment: NORTH restaurant dining room restored and dressed for service, two long rows of wooden tables with crisp white linen tablecloths and place settings stretching into the background, vintage industrial pendant lights glowing warm amber overhead, exposed weathered red brick walls on both sides, polished hardwood floor reflecting light, large windows on the right pouring golden morning light at a low angle, dust motes in the beams

scenes.title: Pencerede Bekleyiş
scenes.framing: camera back 4 meters at 2m height, vertical framing, the character standing against the tall bright NORTH window in the mid-frame, the dining room and high beamed ceiling stacked around and above him, sense of stillness
scenes.action: character standing absolutely still in front of the large NORTH front window looking out at the street, both thumbs hooked into the front pockets of the apron, shoulders relaxed, head slightly tilted, contemplative posture before opening
scenes.environment: vast NORTH restaurant dining room in ultra wide composition, character a small silhouette far across the room against the bright morning window with cobblestone street outside and the backwards NORTH sign on the glass, two rows of dressed tables flanking him receding from camera, warm pendant lights, exposed red brick walls left and right, hardwood floor with parallel light streaks, drifting dust particles, profound stillness of a space waiting to be opened
